message:
feat(widgets,fx): add canvas adapters, debug overlay enhancements, and WASM runner

Canvas adapters (ftui-extras): Add adapter implementations for visual
effects canvas rendering, enabling the effects pipeline to target
different output backends through a unified trait interface.

Debug overlay (ftui-widgets): Expand the debug overlay with additional
diagnostic panels and metric displays for real-time performance
monitoring during development.

Event coalescer (ftui-core): Minor refinement to event batching logic
for smoother input processing under high-frequency event streams.

Theme (ftui-extras): Adjust theme color mappings and style definitions
for better contrast and visual consistency across light/dark modes.

Plasma effect: Update plasma shader parameters to align with the new
canvas adapter interface.

Height predictor / Log ring: Small fixes to the Bayesian height
prediction model and circular log buffer edge cases.

WASM runner: Add demo showcase WASM runner source and HTML harness
for browser-based frankentui rendering demos.

Also sync beads issue tracker with latest closed issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
